nasb.text: And in the same way He took the cup after they had eaten, saying, “This cup which is poured out for you is the new covenant in My blood.

esv.text: And likewise the cup after they had eaten, saying, “This cup that is poured out for you is the new covenant in my blood.

cnv.text: 飯後，他照樣拿起杯來，說：“這杯是用我的血所立的新約，這血是為你們流的。

ccb.text: 饭后，祂又举起杯来，说：“这杯是用我的血立的新约，这血是为你们流的。

csbs.text: 晚餐后，他也照样拿起杯来，说：“这杯是用我的血所立的新约，为你们所流的。
